prompt:
Create a photorealistic cinematic fashion portrait in a 3:4 vertical frame, ultra high definition, using Ana de Armas as the visual identity reference. Preserve her recognizable facial structure, deep hazel-green eyes, natural pore detail, soft skin sheen, dark chocolate-brown long loose waves, and an alluring mysterious expression as she looks back over her shoulder.

Style the subject with classic matte red lipstick, sharp eye focus, silky voluminous hair cascading down her back, and a curvy hourglass silhouette. She wears a floor-length metallic silver bodycon maxi dress with a liquid-metal shine, second-skin fit, dramatic open back, thin criss-cross lace-up straps, and a deep thigh-high side slit. Add oversized sparkling crystal hoop earrings and partially visible strappy silver heels.

Set the scene on a luxurious old European street at night, with Baroque architecture, cobblestone pavement, vintage facades, blurred city lights, and romantic nightlife atmosphere. Use warm golden street lamps as the key light, soft city glow as ambient fill, and rim lighting along her hair, shoulder, and jawline. Keep the background shallow-depth-of-field with cinematic bokeh and historic buildings falling into shadow.

Color palette: reflective silver, warm gold, deep midnight blue, and crimson red. Shoot it like a fashion editorial glamour campaign on an 85mm portrait lens at f/1.8, ISO 400, 1/125 shutter, with sharp focus on the eyes, cinematic contrast, ray-traced reflections, glossy fabric highlights, and premium 8K realism.
